SEARCH
Package pe.quillqasoft.dev.core.model

Class BaseException.Builder<E extends BaseException>

java.lang.Object
pe.quillqasoft.dev.core.model.BaseException.Builder<E>
Type Parameters:
E - The specific subtype of BaseException being built.
Enclosing class:
BaseException
public static class BaseException.Builder<E extends BaseException> extends Object
Builder class for dynamically constructing instances of BaseException subclasses by overriding properties mapped in the default catalog.

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    Builder(Class<E> clazz)
    Initializes a builder for the specified exception class and preloads default catalog values.

  • Constructor Details

    • Builder

      public Builder(Class<E> clazz)
      Initializes a builder for the specified exception class and preloads default catalog values.
      Parameters:
      clazz - The runtime class of the exception to build.
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - If the class is missing the ExceptionDef annotation.

  • Method Details

    • withErrorCode

      public BaseException.Builder<E> withErrorCode(String errorCode)
      Overrides the default error code.
      Parameters:
      errorCode - The new error code.
      Returns:
      The current builder instance.

    • withExceptionName

      public BaseException.Builder<E> withExceptionName(String exceptionName)
      Overrides the default exception name.
      Parameters:
      exceptionName - The new exception name.
      Returns:
      The current builder instance.

    • withMessage

      public BaseException.Builder<E> withMessage(String message)
      Overrides the default message.
      Parameters:
      message - The new error message.
      Returns:
      The current builder instance.

    • withStatus

      public BaseException.Builder<E> withStatus(int status)
      Overrides the default HTTP status code.
      Parameters:
      status - The new HTTP status code.
      Returns:
      The current builder instance.

    • withErrors

      public BaseException.Builder<E> withErrors(Map<String,String> errors)
      Injects or overrides custom validation errors.
      Parameters:
      errors - A map of field-level errors.
      Returns:
      The current builder instance.

    • build

      public E build()
      Finalizes the build process and instantiates the specific exception class.
      Returns:
      A newly constructed instance of type E.
      Throws:
      RuntimeException - If reflection fails to instantiate the class.
